component.name: Rhesis
component.summary: Write with confidence — your personal grammar and style assistant

description.p: Rhesis is a desktop writing assistant that helps you write clearly and confidently. Whether you are composing an email, drafting a report, or writing a blog post, Rhesis catches grammar mistakes, suggests better word choices, and improves your style — all without sending your text anywhere.
Unlike cloud-based tools, everything runs on your own machine. Your words stay private, there is no internet dependency, and there are no usage limits or subscriptions.

ul.li: Catches grammar errors, typos, and awkward phrasing
Suggests style improvements to make your writing clearer
Supports 25+ languages — switch between them seamlessly
Automatically detects which language you are writing in
Works entirely offline — your text never leaves your computer
Fits naturally into your KDE desktop
Grammar, style, and spell checking for over 25 languages
Automatic language detection, just start typing
